prompt_text:
### Demographics: 38-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Major Depressive Disorder
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 82.3 kg; Height 184.8 cm; BMI 24.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 115/62 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 8.5%; 6 months ago 8.0%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 7.7%), FPG (12 months ago 224mg/dL; 9 months ago 206mg/dL; 6 months ago 218mg/dL; 3 months ago 201mg/dL; current 181mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 79.3kg; 9 months ago 83.1kg; 6 months ago 79.1kg; 3 months ago 77.8kg; current 82.3kg), Height (12 months ago 184.8cm; 9 months ago 184.8cm; 6 months ago 184.8cm; 3 months ago 184.8cm; current 184.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 24.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 115mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 60mmHg; 9 months ago 60mmHg; 6 months ago 62mmHg; 3 months ago 63mmHg; current 62mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 40U/L; 9 months ago 34U/L; 6 months ago 32U/L; 3 months ago 40U/L; current 34U/L), AST (12 months ago 35U/L; 9 months ago 36U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 34U/L; current 30U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 58mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 59mL/min/1.73m²; current 56mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 211mg/g; 9 months ago 174mg/g; 6 months ago 244mg/g; 3 months ago 254mg/g; current 246mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 89mg/dL; current 88mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 115mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 91mg/dL; current 103mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.8g/dL; current 13.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
